quality_notes: Add vulnerability: mention a mistake, failure, or lesson learned. Try 'I was wrong', 'took me years to learn', or 'finally understood'.
Add more relevant emojis to improve scanability and engagement (target: 4 to 10).
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 AI Name Search Reality Check

I firmly believe that our online presence is our new resume. One moment that drove this home was when I asked an AI assistant for a simple recommendation and then searched my own name. The results made me realize how public signals shape professional discovery. I was surprised by what I found - or rather, what I didn't find.

This uncomfortable realization led me to take action:

Update my LinkedIn profile
Share relevant content regularly
Engage with my network consistently
These actions have helped me take control of my online presence. I'm no longer just a passive recipient of digital noise.

💬 What steps are you taking to manage your online professional identity? #OnlinePresenceMatters #ProfessionalDiscovery #PersonalBranding #DigitalIdentity #CareerManagement
